heading: Labor Statistics, Bureau of: report of Commissioner
label: 1325 Labor Statistics, Bureau of: report of Commissioner
text: In addition to the usual number of the report of the Commissioner of Labor Statistics, twenty-five thousand copies shall be printed: five thousand for the Senate, ten thousand for the House of Representatives, and ten thousand for distribution by the Commissioner.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 271 (, ; , ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 7328 Stat. 614Mar. 4, 1913, ch. 141, § 337 Stat. 737
